channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dead baby fox, 19th July
item.description:
Dead baby fox
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 44, Brabourne Rise, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown shrubs and weeds, 19th July
item.description:
Overgrown plants near the Arnold Estate Sports Cage.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Neckinger Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Site still not left safe and crossing lights not aligned to walkway causing pedestrian safety, 19th July
item.description:
Council have told me they are “satisfied with the contractors measures” put in place to manage this site safely but I’ve seen more issues. I’ve not been here in 2 weeks so probably countless other issues between

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pembury Place, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped black rubbish sack, 19th July
item.description:
Black rubbish bag on verge outside 73 Barham. This is continued nuisance as dumping is prevalent on this verge. We need a camera set up here to prevent the continuous activity! Signs make no difference . Sign days you are being watched but this is no true and makes no difference. Need to catch these people and prosecute!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 50, Barham Road, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Truman’s Road Needs Cleaning, 19th July
item.description:
There was no barrow beat clean yesterday (Saturday 18th) meaning all of Friday’s litter and subsequent litter from the nighttime economy has accumulated today.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Salcombe Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped Santander bike, 19th July
item.description:
Dumped santander bike at Franks park. Just approx 200 yards from valley road entrance

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Valley Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Discarded recycling bin, 19th July
item.description:
Green recycling bin left on pavement filled with rubbish.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Red Hill, Chislehurst, Greater London

item.title: Rubbish dumped, 19th July
item.description:
Loads of rubbish, plastic bags. Cardboard boxes, poles, ottoman boxes etc on southover.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southover, Sundridge, Greater London

item.title: Street light day burning, 19th July
item.description:
Deptford Bridge Street light column Dg09 is day burning. Can column br remarked

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Deptford Bridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Homeless camp in Bromfield Court Courtyard, 19th July
item.description:
People residing in tents in the courtyard. Residents dont feel comfortable using it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): John Roll Way, Bermondsey, Greater London

item.title: Flypostering, 19th July
item.description:
Deals Gateway junction of Deptford Bridge Remove flypostering from traffic lights

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Deptford Bridge, Deptford

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 19th July
item.description:
The vehicle (LG19EAY) was towed (by another vehicle) to its current location on July 17th 2026 at around 1800 hrs. According to DVLA online check, the vehicle is currently taxed (until 01/11/2026) but has no valid MOT certificate (expired 19/11/2025).

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Church Lane, Bromley Common, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The scooters have been thrown in front of garage door, 19th July
item.description:
2 bikes on the pavement and one in the gutter both in front of my door It happened last night around 10pm

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Athenlay Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Moped abandoned, 19th July
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Franklin Road, Penge, Greater London

item.title: Toilet still here!!!, 19th July
item.description:
The previous report of this problem has been closed... This photo was taken today (Sun 19th July). The issue has not beem solved, please can we get it removed? (Please...)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Franklin Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
